sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἕως

- Transliteration: heos

- Phonetic: heh'-oce

- Definition:

1. till, until

- Origin: of uncertain affinity

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Conjunction

- Strong's: Of uncertain affinity; a conjugation preposition and adverb of continuance until (of time and place): - even (until unto) (as) far (as) how long (un-) til (-l) (hither- un- up) to while (-s).
